     product.save()
     return True
file_context:
def update_stock(pid, qty):
    product = Product.get(pid)
    if product is None:
        return
    product.stock += qty
    product.save()
    return True

gold_annotations.issue: Silent None return violates bool return type. Callers can't distinguish missing product from failure.
